results.rendered_html: dṛṣad  UṆĀDIS. 1,130 . f. Felsen, ein grosser Stein, Mühlstein, insbes. der untere der beiden Mühlsteine (s. upalā)  AK. 2,3,4 .  H. 1035 . 2,226. fg.   MED. d. 32 . dṛṣadeva pra mṛṇa rakṣaḥ  ṚV. 7,104,22 . dṛṣadaṃ jiḥvayāvadhīt 8,61,4 .  AV. 2,31,1 . dṛṣadā khalvāniva (nyakaram) 5,23,8 .  VS. p. 58,17 . dṛṣad und upalā gehören zu dem Opfergeräthe (yajñāyudha)  TS. 1,6,8,3 . 9,3 .  ŚAT. BR. 1,1,1,22 . 2,6,1,9 .  ĀŚV. GṚHY. 4,3 .  KĀTY. ŚR. 2,5,5 . paścādagnerdṛṣadamaśmānaṃ pratiṣṭhāpya  ĀŚV. GṚHY. 1,7 . dṛṣadupala n. sg. gaṇa rājadantādi zu  P. 2,2,31 .  PRAB. 21,11 . —  SUŚR. 1,231,10 . kāyaḥ kaṭhinadṛṣadantarvidalitaḥ  BHARTṚ. 2,77 . 1,45 .  RAGH. 4,74 .  MEGH. 56 .  PAÑCAT. III, 14 .  KATHĀS. 10,123 .  VET. 6,15 .  BHĀG. P. 5,7,9 . Die Form dṛṣada im comp. dṛṣadolūkhala  HARIV. 6509 . — Viell. von 1. dar.

results.rendered_html:
dṛṣad f. [dṝ-adi ṣuk hrasvaśca; cf.  Uṇ. 1. 128 ]
1 A rock, large stone, or stone in general;  Me. 55 ;  R. 4. 74 ;  Bh. 1. 38. 
2 A mill-stone, a flat stone for grinding condiments upon.
Comp.
— upalaḥ a grind-stone for grinding condiments upon. (
(pb) dṛṣadimāṣakaḥ a tax raised from mill-stones).
